title: ferray-ma: no nomask sentinel — all-false mask still allocates a full bool array
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy has a nomask sentinel (a special False singleton) that means 'no mask at all'. An unmasked MaskedArray carries nomask instead of a full bool array of False values. This saves memory and enables fast-path checks (if mask is nomask, skip all mask logic). ferray-ma always allocates a full Array<bool, D> even when nothing is masked. Add an Option<Array<bool, D>> for the mask (None = no mask) or an enum MaskState { NoMask, Full(Array<bool, D>) }.
